view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where settings are copied from one business to another, but the evidence provided does not confirm this behavior. While there are successful prior steps related to customer actions, none of them provide direct evidence that the expected outcome of the scenario is supported or that it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use case mentions the need for operational posting truth and time segment allocation, but does not demonstrate their fulfillment in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
